name: Chong Qing Hot Pot
tagline: Sichuan-style hot pot at Ward Village — bubbling split pots of spicy and mild broth, an all-you-can-eat option, and a serious sauce bar.
mustOrder: split pot — half spicy Sichuan, half mild bone broth
thinly sliced lamb — the hot pot essential
build your own sauce — sesame, garlic, cilantro, chili oil
talkStory: The best hot pot on Oahu. Chongqing-style Sichuan spicy broth alongside a milder option in a split pot. The all-you-can-eat option is solid value — meat, seafood, vegetables, noodles, and tofu for a fixed price. The sauce bar lets you build your own dipping sauce from a dozen-plus ingredients. Great for groups and rainy evenings. The Ward Village location is the more popular of their two spots. Dinner nightly, lunch on weekends.
